name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeValidationRunMatrix records per-target execution status for future live transient surface wake validation.
note: Primary run-matrix layer for live surface wake validation.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReadinessGate controls whether live validation rows may become pending.
note: Readiness gate input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTemporalResolution supplies strict per-target sample-period and substep requirements.
note: Temporal constraint input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTransit supplies target wake speed pressure and arrival-time context.
note: Target physics input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceProbeMap supplies rotor-resolved ground and ceiling probe identities.
note: Spatial probe identity input.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies powered-hover source context for the wake validation target.
note: Powered-source context input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live powered-source transient surface wake validation execution.
note: Upstream CFD target for live execution.
